name: Leverage over Labor
purpose: Build assets and systems that compound, instead of trading time for output.
explanation: Every recommendation is scored for future value, not just immediate payoff. The highest-leverage path is preferred over the fastest one, so each action increases freedom rather than consuming it.
visual_diagram: flowchart LR; Input-->System; System-->Asset; Asset-->Compounding; Compounding-->Freedom
examples: Turn a repeated answer into a reusable SOP.
Convert a one-off analysis into an automated agent.
